column1: # Single source of truth for all devices across all sites.
#   Hostname   -- Full hostname in EXA+ROLE+SITE+NNN format
#   HostOctet  -- Host part of IP only (e.g. 67). Base derived from sites.csv.
#                 Leave blank for non-networked assets -- zone templates emit a comment.
#   OS         -- Operating system / firmware / model (free text)
#   CLD (192.168.139.0/24) is the provisioning network -- it is structurally
#   different from all site subnets. It does not follow the standard SUFFIX_MAP
